title: Olietta Oil Dispenser Borosilicate Glass Olive Oil Bottle - 250ml Non Drip Dispenser - Leak Proof Pourer Vinegar Drizzler - Easy Clean Drip Free Bottles for Kitchen
features: MESS-FREE POURING: Bid farewell to spills and drips with the Olietta glass oil dispenser bottle. Designed for optimal pouring, its non-drip glass spout ensures precise drizzling, delivering the perfect amount of oil every time. It's a must-have for your kitchen.

PREMIUM BOROSILICATE GLASS: Crafted from high-quality food-grade borosilicate glass, the Olietta oil dispenser bottle is hygienic and effectively seals out air, preserving the freshness and clarity of your olive oil.

VERSATILE SIZES: Olietta offers three convenient sizes to meet all your oil pouring needs, from dressing salads to preparing meals or infusing chili oil. Maximize freshness and pour with precision and control, eliminating waste.

CUSTOMER SATISFACTION GUARANTEE: At Olietta, your satisfaction is our priority. If your product arrives damaged, we promise to resolve the issue promptly. Additionally, spare glass nozzles are available for purchase, ensuring your oil dispenser remains functional for years to come.

EFFORTLESS CLEANING: Olietta is dishwasher-safe, ensuring easy cleanup. Simply place it in the dishwasher or wipe it clean. Proudly display this modern and sleek oil bottle on your table, avoiding the mess of greasy oil drizzlers.
